title: Craftable Ores
body:
This Data Pack adds crafting recipes that allows players to craft back ore blocks.

### Ores included:

**Deepslate ores**
- Deepslate Coal Ore
- Deepslate Copper Ore
- Deepslate Diamond Ore
- Deepslate Emerald Ore
- Deepslate Gold Ore
- Deepslate Iron Ore
- Deepslate Lapis Lazuli Ore
- Deepslate Redstone Ore

**Stone ores**
- Coal Ore
- Copper Ore
- Diamond Ore
- Emerald Ore
- Gold Ore
- Iron Ore
- Lapis Lazuli Ore
- Redstone Ore

**Nether ores**
- Nether Gold Ore
- Nether Quartz Ore

To unlock the crafting recipes, pick up the resource of the ore (coal, ingot, diamond, redstone, lapis lazuli or emerald).

Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-ores/gallery) to see the crafting recipes for each ore.
